title: oldenlandia travancorica
intro: Oldenlandia travancorica, also known as the Travancore oldenlandia or Travancore weed, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is an herb that has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Oldenlandia travancorica include reducing fever, treating respiratory infections, and aiding in the management of diabetes. Oldenlandia travancorica is often prepared as a herbal tea or decoction, and it can also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
